data.title: 国际服违规账号封禁24
data.summary: [9/26 (Tue) Ban Notice] We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-g
data.body:
[9/26 (Tue) Ban Notice]

We have taken disciplinary actions against the players who were abusing in-game system in Total Assault and the transaction system.

▶ Total number of players banned: 8
▶ Period: Permanent

More details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?thread=2290158

#BlueArchive
foru
